revision.comment: Add loadData-compatible modules to cache the content of the most-used country data
Put the redirects all on the summary cache. *** existing text overwritten ***
Put the redirects all on the summary cache. *** existing text overwritten ***

Protected "[[Module:CountryData/cacheA]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]] ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))

Changed protection settings for "[[Module:CountryData/cacheA]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 11729 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 6 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:CountryData/cacheA]]
